---
title: "AI Industry Trackers"
description: "Weekly strategy summaries by industry and revenue segment, synthesised from SEC filings, 8-K material events, and news."
---

Strategy context is drawn from 10-Q filings (point-in-time blueprint); material events from 8-K filings (M&A, capex, leadership); current developments from news feeds. Each edition covers three revenue tiers — Fortune 100, PE Mid-Size ($500M–$10B), and Startups — and is synthesised by an LLM into a segment-aware narrative.

**View by industry:** Consumer (coming soon) · Industrials (coming soon) · Financials (coming soon)
